## Substrate

## σ, designated a priori

## Conditions and predictions
| condition | prediction |
|---|---|
| live | performs |
| freeze | collapses below bar = chance + 0.5·(live − chance) |
| paired shadow | collapses |
| symmetry control | survives |
| notebook-free twin | unaffected |

## Kill criteria
